top_signals.title: China says it can withstand trade freeze ahead of EU talks
top_signals.summary: State media increases pressure in advance of high-stakes negotiations with Brussels
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto exchange BitMEX removes CEO, CFO and head of growth
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: BAT Cost-Cutting Hits 9,000 Roles as Turnaround Plan Intensifies
top_signals.summary: British American Tobacco Plc is reducing its 47,000-strong global workforce by about one-fifth as part of a sweeping plan to bring down costs and simplify operations.

top_signals.title: Bridgepoint to Buy Kayne Anderson Real Estate for $1.4 Billion
top_signals.summary: UK private equity firm Bridgepoint Group Plc has agreed to buy Florida-based Kayne Anderson Real Estate, the group’s first push into US property.

top_signals.title: Burnham to pledge sweeping devolution in bid to become U.K. PM
top_signals.summary: The former Greater Manchester mayor will set out on Monday how he'd "lift Britain back up" by handing more decision making powers to local authorities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
